channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran-US nuclear talks stall as Tehran rejects tougher Trump proposal
item.description: Iran’s top negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, has publicly stated that Tehran does not trust the United States and will not accept any agreement unless Iranian rights are fully guaranteed. His comm...

item.title: Emergency services rescue fans and police make arrests during Arsenal Premier League parade
item.description: A celebratory parade for Arsenal’s Premier League success in London on Sunday was marred by a series of public safety incidents, prompting large-scale emergency responses and police action. Thousands ...

item.title: David Pakman Highlights Senator McCormick's Use of the Word 'Regime' During Fox News Interview About Trump Administration
item.description: A political controversy emerged after Senator David McCormick of Pennsylvania appeared on Fox News and discussed President Donald Trump's policies regarding Iran. During the interview on 'America's Ne...

item.title: TNVS Drivers Take Home P1 Million Jackpot in Everybody Sing Season 4
item.description: A group of TNVS (Transport Network Vehicle Service) drivers emerged as the big winners on Season 4 of the ABS-CBN game and musical entertainment program 'Everybody Sing.' According to the report publi...

item.title: Sara Cox Shares How She Transformed Her Health and Fitness at 51
item.description: Sara Cox, known for her lively television persona in the 1990s, has undergone a remarkable transformation in her health and fitness. At 51, the former 'ladette' has traded her party lifestyle for a di...

item.title: Victor Wembanyama highlights Gregg Popovich’s lasting influence as Spurs reach NBA Finals
item.description: The San Antonio Spurs have advanced to the NBA Finals for the first time in this new era, setting up a high-profile matchup against the New York Knicks. Central to the team’s journey is star centre Vi...

item.title: Asagba of Asaba Raises Alarm Over Unregulated Burial Practices in Residential Communities
item.description: The Asagba of Asaba, HRH Prof. Epiphany Azinge, has raised serious concern over the growing practice of indiscriminate grave digging within residential communities in Asaba, Delta State. During a fami...

item.title: Bafana Bafana’s World Cup Travel Delayed Due to Visa Issues
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s preparations for the FIFA World Cup 2026 have been temporarily disrupted due to administrative delays with visas, but the issue has now been largely resolved. The South African Footbal...

item.title: Oil prices rise amid tighter US stance on Iran war agreement
item.description: Oil markets opened higher in early trading following reports that the United States has toughened the terms of its ongoing war-related agreement with Iran, according to Agence France-Presse. The devel...

item.title: Understanding the Full Ecological Crisis Beyond Heatwaves
item.description: Recent extreme heat events in Europe and Asia have sparked predictable reactions: climate change skepticism, media focus on temperature spikes, and a lack of broader context. While some social media n...

item.title: High inspection fees and rising rents worsen Lagos housing shortage in Lagos
item.description: The housing situation in Lagos is becoming more difficult as both rising rent and indiscriminate inspection fees charged by property agents continue to increase the burden on people searching for acco...

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Reflects on IPL 2026 Success, Emphasises Adaptability, Composure and Fitness
item.description: Rajasthan Royals batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi said that one of the biggest lessons he gained from the IPL 2026 season was learning how to handle pressure situations and adjust his batting approach acco...

item.title: Author claims Trump's popularity declines amid economic challenges and ineffective leadership
item.description: Author Kurt Andersen, former founder of Spy Magazine, argues that President Donald Trump's image as an entertaining alternative in U.S. politics is diminishing due to ongoing economic pressures. Speak...

item.title: Sydney and Melbourne property prices ease as higher rates and policy changes cool housing market
item.description: House prices in Australia’s largest cities have weakened, with Sydney and Melbourne recording monthly declines amid ongoing affordability pressures, higher interest rates, and recent policy changes af...

item.title: Parliamentary disclosures highlight ministerial calendar error, Albanese gifts, and increased Taiwan travel
item.description: This Crikey column from the ‘The Horse’s Mouth’ series examines a mix of political disclosures and behind-the-scenes developments involving Australian federal politics and international engagement. It...

item.title: Federal audit launched into Indigenous Languages Commissioner’s office following anonymous complaints and governance concerns
item.description: The federal government has launched an independent financial audit into the Office of the Commissioner of Indigenous Languages after receiving anonymous complaints regarding its operations and governa...

item.title: Political controversy over depiction of Thiruvalluvar in saffron attire in Tamil Nadu
item.description: A political controversy has broken out in Tamil Nadu over the depiction of revered Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar in saffron-coloured attire during a government-linked event. The issue emerg...

item.title: Hamilton's Chinese Community Thrives Without an Official Chinatown
item.description: Hamilton, Ontario, never developed an official Chinatown, yet its Chinese community has persisted and grown through grassroots efforts and community spaces. Despite early proposals in the 1980s to cre...

item.title: BJP finalises RS and MLC candidates ahead of nominations
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) held a meeting of its Central Election Committee at Prime Minister Narendra Modi's residence to decide the party’s candidates for the Rajya Sabha elections and state L...

item.title: Rajasthan Government Takes Strict Action Against Corrupt and Negligent Officials
item.description: The Rajasthan government has launched a stringent anti-corruption drive, resulting in the dismissal of 20 officials and suspension of 332 others. Chief Minister Bhajanlal Sharma has emphasised that pu...
